name: Priya S.
text: Absolutely stunning place! The jacuzzi was the highlight of our stay — we spent hours in it. The apartment was spotlessly clean, beautifully decorated, and had everything we needed. Mirashya was super responsive. 10/10 would recommend for couples!

name: Rohan M.
text: Perfect romantic getaway in Goa! The apartment exceeded all expectations. The location is great — walkable to Candolim beach. The host was very helpful with local restaurant recommendations. Will definitely be back.

name: Ananya K.
text: We stayed here for our anniversary and it was magical. The decor is gorgeous, the jacuzzi is private and spacious. Everything was immaculate. Highly recommend to anyone looking for a luxury experience on a budget.

name: Vikram D.
text: Great property overall! The jacuzzi was amazing and the apartment felt very premium. A small note — the WiFi was a bit slow at times. But the host resolved it quickly. The location is very convenient.

name: Sneha R.
text: One of the best Airbnbs I've stayed at in India. The photos don't even do it justice! The jacuzzi, the bedroom setup, the kitchen — all top notch. The host was warm and welcoming. Absolutely loved it!

name: Karan P.
text: Stayed here for a week with my partner — couldn't have asked for a better place. Peaceful, private, and luxurious. The jacuzzi was running perfectly. The host checked in regularly to make sure everything was comfortable. Highly recommended!
